name: run_query
description: Run a query against the Algolia search index with advanced options

query.description: The query to run against the index

hitsPerPage.description: The number of hits to return per page

filters.description: The filter expression using Algolia's filter syntax (e.g., 'category:Book AND price < 100')

facets.description: Comma-separated list of attributes to facet on

restrictSearchableAttributes.description: Comma-separated list of attributes to search in

name: list_indices
description: List the indices in the application

name: get_settings
description: Get the settings for the Algolia index

name: set_settings
description: Change the settings for the Algolia index

object.description: The object to insert or update as a JSON string

name: clear_index
description: Clear an index by removing all records

name: copy_index
description: Copy an index to a another index

indexName.description: The name of the destination index

name: move_index
description: Move an index to another index

indexName.description: The name of the destination index

name: delete_index
description: Delete an index by removing all assets and configurations

name: get_object
description: Get an object by its object ID

objectID.description: The object ID to look up

name: insert_object
description: Insert or update an object in the Algolia index

object.description: The object to insert or update as a JSON string (must include an objectID field)

name: insert_objects
description: Insert or update multiple objects in the Algolia index

objects.description: Array of objects to insert or update as a JSON string (each must include an objectID field)

name: delete_object
description: Delete an object by its object ID

name: search_rules
description: Search for rules in the Algolia index

anchoring.description: When specified, restricts matches to rules with a specific anchoring type. When omitted, all anchoring types may match.

context.description: When specified, restricts matches to contextual rules with a specific context. When omitted, all contexts may match.

enabled.description: When specified, restricts matches to rules with a specific enabled status. When omitted, all enabled statuses may match.

name: delete_rule
description: Delete a rule by its object ID

name: get_synonym
description: Get a synonym from the Algolia index by its ID

objectID.description: The unique identifier of the synonym to retrieve

name: save_synonym
description: Save or update a synonym in the Algolia index

objectID.description: The unique identifier of the synonym

synonym.description: The synonym object as a JSON string. Example schema: {"objectID":"unique_id","type":"synonym","synonyms":["word1","word2","word3"]} or {"objectID":"unique_id","type":"oneWaySynonym","input":"word1","synonyms":["word2","word3"]}.

name: search_synonyms
description: Search for synonyms in the Algolia index that match a query

query.description: The query to find synonyms for

name: delete_synonym
description: Delete a synonym by its object ID

name: clear_synonyms
description: Clear all synonyms from the Algolia index

name: analytics_get_click_through_rate
description: Retrieve the click-through rate (CTR) for all your searches with at least one click event, including a daily breakdown

startDate.description: Start date of the period to analyze, in YYYY-MM-DD format

endDate.description: End date of the period to analyze, in YYYY-MM-DD format

tags.description: Tags by which to segment the analytics

name: analytics_get_no_results_rate
description: Retrieve the fraction of searches that didn't return any results within a time range, including a daily breakdown

startDate.description: Start date of the period to analyze, in YYYY-MM-DD format

endDate.description: End date of the period to analyze, in YYYY-MM-DD format

tags.description: Tags by which to segment the analytics

name: analytics_get_searches_count
description: Retrieve the number of searches within a time range, including a daily breakdown

startDate.description: Start date of the period to analyze, in YYYY-MM-DD format

endDate.description: End date of the period to analyze, in YYYY-MM-DD format

tags.description: Tags by which to segment the analytics

name: analytics_get_top_searches
description: Retrieve the most popular searches for an index

clickAnalytics.description: Whether to include metrics related to click and conversion events in the response

revenueAnalytics.description: Whether to include metrics related to revenue events in the response

startDate.description: Start date of the period to analyze, in YYYY-MM-DD format

endDate.description: End date of the period to analyze, in YYYY-MM-DD format

orderBy.description: Attribute by which to order the response items (searchCount, clickThroughRate, conversionRate, averageClickPosition)

direction.description: Sorting direction of the results: asc or desc

offset.description: Position of the first item to return

tags.description: Tags by which to segment the analytics

name: analytics_get_users_count
description: Retrieve the number of unique users within a time range, including a daily breakdown. By default, Algolia distinguishes search users by their IP address, unless you include a pseudonymous user identifier in your search requests with the userToken API parameter or x-algolia-usertoken request header.

startDate.description: Start date of the period to analyze, in YYYY-MM-DD format

endDate.description: End date of the period to analyze, in YYYY-MM-DD format

tags.description: Tags by which to segment the analytics

name: monitoring_get_clusters_status
description: Retrieves the status of all Algolia clusters and instances

name: monitoring_get_cluster_status
description: Retrieves the status of selected clusters

clusters.description: Subset of clusters, separated by commas (e.g., c1-de,c2-de,c3-de)

name: monitoring_get_incidents
description: Retrieves known incidents for all clusters

name: monitoring_get_cluster_incidents
description: Retrieves known incidents for the selected clusters

clusters.description: Subset of clusters, separated by commas (e.g., c1-de,c2-de,c3-de)

name: monitoring_get_reachability
description: Test whether clusters are reachable or not

clusters.description: Subset of clusters, separated by commas (e.g., c1-de,c2-de,c3-de)

name: monitoring_get_latency
description: Retrieves the average latency for search requests for selected clusters

clusters.description: Subset of clusters, separated by commas (e.g., c1-de,c2-de,c3-de)

name: monitoring_get_indexing_time
description: Retrieves average times for indexing operations for selected clusters

clusters.description: Subset of clusters, separated by commas (e.g., c1-de,c2-de,c3-de)

name: monitoring_get_metrics
description: Retrieves metrics related to your Algolia infrastructure, aggregated over a selected time window

metric.description: Metric to report (avg_build_time, ssd_usage, ram_search_usage, ram_indexing_usage, cpu_usage, or * for all)

period.description: Period over which to aggregate the metrics (minute, hour, day, week, month)

name: monitoring_get_servers
description: Retrieves the servers that belong to clusters

name: collections_list_collections
description: Retrieve a list of all collections

offset.description: Number of items to skip (default to 0)

limit.description: Number of items per fetch (defaults to 10)

name: collections_get_collection
description: Retrieve a collection by ID

name: collections_upsert_collection
description: Upserts a collection

add.description: JSON array of objectIDs to add to the collection

remove.description: JSON array of objectIDs to remove from the collection

conditions.description: JSON object with conditions to filter records

name: collections_commit_collection
description: Evaluates the changes on a collection and replicates them to the index

name: collections_delete_collection
description: Soft deletes a collection by setting 'deleted' to true

name: recommend_get_recommendations
description: Retrieve recommendations from selected AI models

requests.description: JSON array of recommendation requests. Each request must include 'indexName', 'threshold', and a model-specific configuration.

name: recommend_get_recommend_rule
description: Retrieve a Recommend rule that you previously created in the Algolia dashboard

indexName.description: Name of the index on which to perform the operation

name: recommend_search_recommend_rules
description: Search for Recommend rules. Use an empty query to list all rules for this recommendation scenario.

indexName.description: Name of the index on which to perform the operation

context.description: Only search for rules with matching context

page.description: Requested page of the API response

hitsPerPage.description: Maximum number of hits per page

enabled.description: Whether to only show rules where the value of their 'enabled' property matches this parameter

filters.description: Filter expression. This only searches for rules matching the filter expression

name: recommend_batch_recommend_rules
description: Create or update a batch of Recommend Rules

indexName.description: Name of the index on which to perform the operation

rules.description: JSON array of Recommend rules to create or update

clearExistingRules.description: Whether to replace all existing rules with the provided batch

name: recommend_delete_recommend_rule
description: Delete a Recommend rule from a recommendation scenario

indexName.description: Name of the index on which to perform the operation

name: recommend_get_recommend_status
description: Check the status of a given task

indexName.description: Name of the index on which to perform the operation

name: usage_get_daily_metrics
description: Returns a list of billing metrics per day for the specified applications

applications.description: Comma-separated list of Algolia Application IDs

startDate.description: The start date of the period for which the metrics should be returned (YYYY-MM-DD)

endDate.description: The end date (included) of the period for which the metrics should be returned (YYYY-MM-DD)

metricNames.description: Comma-separated list of metric names to retrieve

name: usage_get_hourly_metrics
description: Returns a list of billing metrics per hour for the specified application

startTime.description: The start time of the period for which the metrics should be returned (ISO 8601 format)

endTime.description: The end time (included) of the period for which the metrics should be returned (ISO 8601 format)

metricNames.description: Comma-separated list of metric names to retrieve

name: usage_get_metrics_registry
description: Returns the list of available metrics

applications.description: Comma-separated list of Algolia Application IDs

name: query_suggestions_list_configs
description: Retrieves all Query Suggestions configurations of your Algolia application

name: query_suggestions_get_config
description: Retrieves a single Query Suggestions configuration by its index name

name: query_suggestions_create_config
description: Creates a new Query Suggestions configuration

sourceIndices.description: JSON array of source indices configurations

languages.description: JSON array of languages or boolean for deduplicating singular and plural suggestions

exclude.description: JSON array of words or regular expressions to exclude from the suggestions

enablePersonalization.description: Whether to turn on personalized query suggestions

allowSpecialCharacters.description: Whether to include suggestions with special characters

name: query_suggestions_update_config
description: Updates a Query Suggestions configuration

sourceIndices.description: JSON array of source indices configurations

languages.description: JSON array of languages or boolean for deduplicating singular and plural suggestions

exclude.description: JSON array of words or regular expressions to exclude from the suggestions

enablePersonalization.description: Whether to turn on personalized query suggestions

allowSpecialCharacters.description: Whether to include suggestions with special characters

name: query_suggestions_delete_config
description: Deletes a Query Suggestions configuration

name: query_suggestions_get_config_status
description: Reports the status of a Query Suggestions index

name: query_suggestions_get_log_file
description: Retrieves the logs for a single Query Suggestions index

name: abtesting_list_abtests
description: List all A/B tests configured for this application

offset.description: Position of the first item to return

indexPrefix.description: Index name prefix. Only A/B tests for indices starting with this string are included in the response

indexSuffix.description: Index name suffix. Only A/B tests for indices ending with this string are included in the response

name: abtesting_get_abtest
description: Retrieve the details for an A/B test by its ID

name: abtesting_create_abtest
description: Create a new A/B test

endAt.description: End date and time of the A/B test, in RFC 3339 format (e.g., 2023-06-17T00:00:00Z)

variants.description: A/B test variants as JSON array (exactly 2 variants required). Each variant must have 'index' and 'trafficPercentage' fields, and may optionally have 'description' and 'customSearchParameters' fields.

name: abtesting_schedule_abtest
description: Schedule an A/B test to be started at a later time

scheduledAt.description: Date and time when the A/B test is scheduled to start, in RFC 3339 format (e.g., 2023-06-15T15:06:44.400601Z)

endAt.description: End date and time of the A/B test, in RFC 3339 format (e.g., 2023-06-17T00:00:00Z)

variants.description: A/B test variants as JSON array (exactly 2 variants required). Each variant must have 'index' and 'trafficPercentage' fields, and may optionally have 'description' and 'customSearchParameters' fields.

name: abtesting_stop_abtest
description: Stop an A/B test by its ID. You can't restart stopped A/B tests.

name: abtesting_delete_abtest
description: Delete an A/B test by its ID

name: abtesting_estimate_abtest
description: Estimate the sample size and duration of an A/B test based on historical traffic

variants.description: A/B test variants as JSON array (exactly 2 variants required). Each variant must have 'index' and 'trafficPercentage' fields, and may optionally have 'description' and 'customSearchParameters' fields.

configuration.description: A/B test configuration as JSON object. Must include 'minimumDetectableEffect' with 'size' and 'metric' fields. May optionally include 'outliers' and 'emptySearch' settings.
